LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTHONY J. CICCOLINI, JR.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING CLERK TO HONOR LEVY AND TURN OVER FUNDS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR MR. CICCOLINI IS ENTITLED TO LEVY ON THE SUBJECT PROPERTY PURSUANT TO CCP 695.010(A). MR. CICCOLINI HAS SERVED A NOTICE OF LEVY TO THE CLERK'S OFFICE FOR THE $10,000 HELD IN CASE NUMBER CGC-10-500974. THE CLERK'S OFFICE DID NOT OBJECT TO THE LEVY UNDER CCP 701.010(B). THE $10,000 VEXATIOUS LITIGANT BOND THAT WAS POSTED BY MR. GRASSI IN THIS ACTION WAS EXONERATED AND DISCHARGED BY COURT ORDER FILED JANUARY 25, 2013. AS SUCH, IT IS SUBJECT TO LEVY BY MR. CICCOLINI, AND THE FUNDS SHOULD BE TURNED OVER TO THE SHERIFF. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTHONY J JR CICCOLINI'S MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING CLERK TO HONR LEVY AND DISBURSE $10,000.00 DEPOSIT IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT CICCOLINI HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR THE COURT TO MAKE A FINDING AS TO WHEN A LEVY WAS MADE ON THE THIRD PERSON (I.E., THE CLERK'S OFFICE) AND WHAT RESPONSE, IF ANY, WAS RECEIVED FROM THE THIRD PERSON. THE DECLARATION OF MR. GOODMAN IS INSUFFICIENT IN THIS REGARD; THE RECORD BEFORE THE COURT IS UNCLEAR. FURTHER, THIS MOTION HAS NOT BEEN SERVED ON THE THIRD PERSON AS TO WHOM DEFENDANT CICCOLINI SEEKS TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH THE LEVY PURSUANT TO CCP 701.010. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ANTHONY J JR CICCOLINI & JOSEPHINE CICCOLINI'S MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING CLERK TO HONOR LEVY AND DISBURSE $10,000.00 DEPOSIT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ALTHOUGH NO OPPOSITION IS FILED, MOVING PARTY HAS NOT IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY THE FUNDS THAT IT IS SEEKING TO HAVE RELEASED. "THE $10,000 SECURITY BOND POSTED BY DAVID GRASSI AKA PROFESSIONAL CONCRETE WORK" - THE DESCRIPTION IN THE NOTICE OF LEVY ATTACHED TO THE GOODMAN DECLARATION - DOES NOT EVEN SPECIFY THE CASE NAME OR NUMBER IN WHICH THE "SECURITY BOND" IS "POSTED." (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Noice Of Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Honor Levy And Turn Over Funds;
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shanshan Zou, Esq. of the Law Offices of Martin D. Goodman, Tel. 415.677.4497, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT ANTHONY J. CICCOLINI, JR.'s Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Honor Levy And Turn Over Funds is granted. No opposition filed. Judgment creditor Mr. Ciccolini is entitled to levy on the subject property pursuant to CCP 695.010(a). Mr. Ciccolini has served a notice of levy to the clerk's office for the $10,000 held in Case Number CGC-10-500974. The Clerk's Office did not object to the levy under CCP 701.010(b). The $10,000 vexatious litigant bond that was posted by Mr. Grassi in this action was exonerated and discharged by Court order filed January 25, 2013. As such, it is subject to levy by Mr. Ciccolini, and the funds should be turned over to the Sheriff. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Honr Levy And Disburse $10,000.00 Deposit
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID GRASSI, ESQ., PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
MARTIN GOODMAN, ESQ. AND SHANSHAN ZOU, ESQ., 415.397.6376, FOR DEFENDANT JULIEN SIGNES.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ANTHONY J JR CICCOLINI'S Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Honr Levy And Disburse $10,000.00 Deposit IS Denied, without prejudice. Defendant Ciccolini has not presented sufficient evidence for the Court to make a finding as to when a levy was made on the third person (i.e., the Clerk's office) and what response, if any, was received from the third person. The declaration of Mr. Goodman is insufficient in this regard; the record before the Court is unclear. Further, this motion has not been served on the third person as to whom Defendant Ciccolini seeks to compel compliance with the levy pursuant to CCP 701.010. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Mtn For Order Directing Clerk To Honor Levy
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ANTHONY J JR CICCOLINI & JOSEPHINE CICCOLINI's motion For Order Directing Clerk To Honor Levy and disburse $10,000.00 deposit is Denied without prejudice. Although no opposition is filed, moving party has not identified with particularity the funds that it is seeking to have released. "The $10,000 security bond posted by David Grassi aka Professional Concrete Work" - the description in the Notice of Levy attached to the Goodman Declaration - does not even specify the case name or number in which the "security bond" is "posted." (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
